payload.answer: Not storing the provided statement as durable memory because it appears to be part of a cascade test rather than a confirmed user-supplied fact.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is framed as a test (“Cascade test: … cheap/default model …”). Treat as non-authoritative; do not commit personal family facts from a likely synthetic/testing context.

details: Detected test/synthetic framing; avoided durable memory commit.

repair_options: Ask the user to confirm the statement as a real personal memory (e.g., “Are Nur and Sara your twin daughters?”) and store only after confirmation.
